mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE cat_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM category WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT c.id FROM category c INNER JOIN cat_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL )
SELECT q.id, q.stem, q.question_type AS questionType, CASE q.question_type WHEN 1 THEN '单选题' WHEN 2 THEN '判断题' END AS questionTypeName, q.category_id AS categoryId, cat.name AS categoryName, q.difficulty, CASE q.difficulty WHEN 1 THEN '简单' WHEN 2 THEN '中等' WHEN 3 THEN '困难' END AS difficultyName, CASE WHEN qc_agg.question_id IS NULL THEN 'CATEGORY_ALL' ELSE 'SPECIFIED_COURSE' END AS scope, CASE WHEN qc_agg.question_id IS NULL THEN '类别及子类别通用' ELSE '指定课程' END AS scopeName, qc_agg.course_ids_str AS courseIdsStr, qc_agg.course_names_str AS courseNamesStr, q.status, q.created_at AS createdAt, q.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM assessment_question q LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = q.category_id AND cat.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT aqc.question_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT aqc.course_id ORDER BY aqc.course_id SEPARATOR ',') AS course_ids_str, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.title ORDER BY aqc.course_id SEPARATOR ',') AS course_names_str FROM assessment_question_course aqc JOIN course c ON c.id = aqc.course_id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY aqc.question_id ) qc_agg ON qc_agg.question_id = q.id WHERE q.deleted_at IS NULL
AND q.stem LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND q.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM cat_tree)
AND ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM assessment_question_course WHERE question_id = q.id) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM assessment_question_course WHERE question_id = q.id AND course_id = #{courseId}) )
AND q.question_type = #{questionType}
AND q.difficulty = #{difficulty}
AND q.status = #{status}
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM assessment_question_course WHERE question_id = q.id)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM assessment_question_course WHERE question_id = q.id)
ORDER BY q.created_at DESC, q.id DESC

WITH RECURSIVE cat_ancestors AS ( SELECT id, parent_id FROM category WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT c.id, c.parent_id FROM category c INNER JOIN cat_ancestors ca ON c.id = ca.parent_id WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assessment_question q WHERE q.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM cat_ancestors) AND q.question_type = #{questionType} AND q.status = 1 AND q.deleted_at IS NULL AND ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM assessment_question_course WHERE question_id = q.id) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM assessment_question_course WHERE question_id = q.id AND course_id = #{courseId}) )
